title: System degraded — backend, database failure
impact: Critical systems failed: backend, database. Suggested actions: Increase backend health-check frequency, add a circuit breaker around /api/health, and enable autoscaling for error bursts. | Add DB connection pool monitoring, enforce connection timeouts, add retry-with-backoff for transient DB errors, and surface DB health metrics. | Standardize metrics and tracing across services, add centralized dashboards and alerting for SLO breaches.

title: Sovereign Intelligence Bridge Sync
impact: Successfully synchronized SearXNG live search with the SKIA core intelligence engine. All systems reporting 2026 live data.
